Our Product Line

Industrial Packaging for Every Need

From electrostatic-safe FIBCs to food-grade solutions and certified industrial paper bags.

🧺
FIBC
Type A FIBC Bulk Bags
Standard virgin polypropylene bulk bags for non-flammable dry goods. The most widely used FIBC in industry.
View Product →
🛍️
FIBC
Type B FIBC Bulk Bags
Low breakdown voltage PP fabric — safe near flammable solvents. No grounding required.
View Product →
⚡
FIBC
Type C FIBC Bulk Bags
Conductive grounded bags with interwoven carbon thread grid — safe for flammable powders and ATEX environments.
View Product →
🛡️
FIBC
Type D FIBC Bulk Bags
Dissipative antistatic fabric — no grounding needed. Safest FIBC for explosive atmosphere applications.
View Product →
🍽️
Food Grade
Food & Pharma Grade FIBCs
FDA and EU-compliant bulk bags using virgin PP and food-safe liners. Full regulatory documentation provided.
View Product →
🥜
Specialty
APC Peanut Totes
Purpose-built to American Peanut Council specifications. Food-safe, UV-stabilized, and standardized for all APC equipment.
View Product →
⚓
Specialty
Stevedore FIBCs & Sandbags
Heavy-duty reinforced crane-loop FIBCs and UV-stabilized woven PP sandbags for port, marine, and construction use.
View Product →
🧲
Liners
FIBC Bag Liners
Custom-fit PE, antistatic, and barrier film liners providing moisture and contamination protection for your bulk bags.
View Product →
Paper Bags
PVSE — Pasted Valve Sacks
Multi-wall kraft paper bags with self-sealing valve. Compatible with high-speed rotary packers for cement, lime, and powders.
View Product →
Paper Bags
PBOM — Pinch Bottom Open Mouth
Flat-standing pinch-sealed base for retail and trade presentation. Premium print surface for branding.
View Product →
Paper Bags
SOM — Sewn Open Mouth Bags
Sewn-bottom multiwall paper bags for high-speed industrial filling lines. Most cost-effective paper bag format.
View Product →
Certified
UN Certified Industrial Paper Bags
Independently tested and UN-marked for hazardous material transport. Meets TDG, DOT, IATA, and IMDG regulations.
View Product →
🚢
Container
Bulk Container Liners
Convert 20ft/40ft ISO containers into bulk vessels for dry or liquid cargo. Major cost savings vs. drums or IBCs.
View Product →
Dunnage
Air Dunnage Bags
Inflatable bags that fill void spaces in containers and rail cars — prevents load shifting and cargo damage.
View Product →
